beats: Lin Che pushes open the door.
All corridor lights turn on in sequence.
The broken elevator rings for the first time.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 林澈推开门，走廊灯全部亮起，坏掉的电梯第一次响铃。
